shared_rules.hatch_consistency: Use the official Hatch mascot reference as the source of truth.

assets.hatch_variant: pointing narrator integrated into story scene
assets.alt: Hatch mascot holding Morning Brew coffee mugs — the referral rewards that turned readers into recruiters.
assets.caption: Hatch mascot holding Morning Brew coffee mugs — the referral rewards that turned readers into recruiters.
assets.prompt: Morning Brew's Referral Engine | hero: Hatch mascot (the HackProduct robot with graduation cap and growth arrow) holding a stack of coffee mugs labeled "Morning Brew" on a cream background. Hatch's expression is pleased and slightly mischievous — these are the referral rewards, and they worked. No speech bubble. HackProduct wordmark watermark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 2400x1350. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.
assets.crop_notes: Center-cover crop checked against role safe zone.
qa: Official Hatch reference required by prompt and manifest.
Watermark applied in post-processing.
No exact logos, fake screenshots, real person likenesses, or implied endorsement.

assets.alt: Hatch gesturing at an email with a referral link, showing how readers became recruiters.
assets.caption: Hatch gesturing at an email with a referral link, showing how readers became recruiters.
assets.prompt: Morning Brew's Referral Engine | hatch-narrator: Hatch in narrator pose, gesturing at an oversized email envelope with a small "Share" link at the bottom. A chain of small user icons radiates outward from the link — each one connected to the next. The chain suggests exponential reach from a single link. Cream background, no copy. HackProduct wordmark watermark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 1600x1600. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.

assets.alt: Hatch pointing at the milestone structure in Morning Brew's referral ladder.
assets.caption: Hatch pointing at the milestone structure in Morning Brew's referral ladder.
assets.prompt: Morning Brew's Referral Engine | failure-mechanism: Hatch in thinking pose, looking at a progress bar divided into milestone segments — labeled "1," "5," "15," "25" — with a coffee mug icon at 5, a t-shirt at 15, a larger prize at 25. A small reader figure stands at the "3" mark, close to the next reward. Hatch is pointing at the gap between the figure and the milestone. Cream background. HackProduct wordmark watermark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 1800x1200. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.
